examples: A new design method for establishing the thrust scheme and overall performance parameters of hypervelocity kinetic antitank missile is provided.
To investigate the characteristics of injuries produced by a large caliber antitank armour piercing shell, so as to provide the basis for protection and treatment in wartime.
The purpose of this paper is to predict precisely the ignition and combustion phenomena that occur in high-pressure antitank guns with centre core ignition and combustible cartridge.
